request_payload.exposure_text: As a fellow American who values our nation's security, I've been following the strategic autonomy debate closely. It's clear that maintaining our independence in critical technologies isn't just about economic strength—it's about ensuring our safety in an unpredictable world. The recent cyber incidents have shown that relying too much on foreign suppliers can leave us vulnerable. Our military and infrastructure deserve the highest level of protection, and that starts with supporting policies that keep our strategic capabilities in American hands. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
